title: Master Dashboard

posts.author: Rubye (Ruby Eagle)
posts.cookedHtml:
is there such thing as a master dashboard?
We have a work space for creating content for our app, another for marketing, another for task items. I just want to see everything in one spot

to connect dashboards to other dashboards and have one master view for all due dates, actions. ect

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: You should try Same Item Multiple Boards
